requirements.description: Project has valid go.mod with required dependencies
stepsToVerify: Verify go.mod exists in project root
Verify dependencies include: github.com/spf13/cobra, google.golang.org/api, golang.org/x/oauth2, gopkg.in/yaml.v3, github.com/AlecAivazis/survey/v2
Run 'go mod tidy' and verify no errors

requirements.description: Project structure matches specified folder layout
stepsToVerify: Verify cmd/fylla/main.go exists as CLI entry point
Verify internal/ contains cli, jira, calendar, scheduler, config, timer packages
Verify config/default_config.yaml exists

requirements.description: CLI entry point is executable and shows help
stepsToVerify: Run 'go run ./cmd/fylla --help'
Verify help output lists available commands
Verify no runtime errors on startup

requirements.description: Config file stored at ~/.config/fylla/config.yaml
stepsToVerify: Run 'fylla config show' and verify config is read from ~/.config/fylla/config.yaml
Create config file manually and verify it is loaded
Verify config directory is created if it doesn't exist

requirements.description: Jira configuration includes url, email, and defaultJql
stepsToVerify: Configure jira.url, jira.email, jira.defaultJql in config
Verify 'fylla list' uses defaultJql for queries
Verify Jira API calls use configured credentials

requirements.description: Calendar configuration includes sourceCalendar and fyllaCalendar
stepsToVerify: Configure calendar.sourceCalendar (read meetings from)
Configure calendar.fyllaCalendar (write tasks to)
Verify sync reads from source and writes to fylla calendar

requirements.description: Scheduling configuration includes windowDays, minTaskDurationMinutes, bufferMinutes
stepsToVerify: Set scheduling.windowDays to 7 and verify sync only schedules 7 days ahead
Set scheduling.minTaskDurationMinutes to 30 and verify slots < 30 min are skipped
Set scheduling.bufferMinutes to 20 and verify 20 min gap between tasks

requirements.description: Business hours configuration includes start, end, and workDays
stepsToVerify: Set businessHours.start to '10:00' and verify no tasks before 10:00
Set businessHours.end to '16:00' and verify no tasks after 16:00
Set businessHours.workDays to [1,2,3,4] and verify no Friday scheduling

requirements.description: Project-specific rules override default business hours
stepsToVerify: Configure projectRules.ADMIN with start: '09:00', end: '10:00'
Create ADMIN project task and verify it's only scheduled 09:00-10:00
Verify tasks from other projects use default business hours

requirements.description: Sorting weights are configurable (priority, dueDate, estimate, issueType, age)
stepsToVerify: Configure weights.priority to 0.50 and verify priority has more impact
Configure weights.dueDate to 0.40 and verify due dates affect sorting more
Verify all weights sum to 1.0 or are normalized

requirements.description: Issue type scores are configurable (Bug, Task, Story)
stepsToVerify: Set typeScores.Bug to 100, typeScores.Task to 50
Create Bug and Task with same priority/due date
Verify Bug is sorted higher than Task

requirements.description: Credentials are stored securely and separately from config
stepsToVerify: Run 'fylla auth jira' and verify token is stored securely
Verify credentials are not stored in plain text config.yaml
Verify Google OAuth credentials are cached for reuse

requirements.description: Fetch tasks via Jira REST API
stepsToVerify: Run 'fylla list' with valid Jira credentials
Verify tasks are fetched from configured Jira instance
Verify HTTP errors are handled gracefully

requirements.description: Support custom JQL queries
stepsToVerify: Run 'fylla sync --jql "project = MYPROJ"'
Verify only tasks matching JQL are fetched
Verify invalid JQL returns clear error message

requirements.description: Post worklog via REST API
stepsToVerify: Run 'fylla log PROJ-123 2h "Worked on feature"'
Verify worklog appears in Jira issue
Verify time is recorded correctly (2 hours)

requirements.description: Update remaining estimate via REST API
stepsToVerify: Run 'fylla estimate PROJ-123 4h'
Verify Jira issue remaining estimate is updated to 4h
Verify 'fylla estimate PROJ-123 +1h' adds 1 hour to current estimate

requirements.description: Create new issues via REST API
stepsToVerify: Run 'fylla add' and complete interactive prompts
Verify new issue is created in Jira
Verify all fields (summary, type, priority, estimate) are set correctly

requirements.description: Parse Jira priority field (1-5 scale)
stepsToVerify: Fetch task with priority 'Highest' (1)
Fetch task with priority 'Lowest' (5)
Verify priorities are correctly mapped to scores

requirements.description: Parse Jira due date field
stepsToVerify: Fetch task with due date set
Verify due date is parsed correctly
Verify tasks without due dates are handled gracefully

requirements.description: Parse original and remaining estimate fields
stepsToVerify: Fetch task with 4h original estimate
Fetch task with 2h remaining estimate
Verify estimates are parsed and used for slot allocation

requirements.description: Parse Jira issue type (Bug, Task, Story)
stepsToVerify: Fetch Bug type issue and verify type is 'Bug'
Fetch Task type issue and verify type is 'Task'
Fetch Story type issue and verify type is 'Story'

requirements.description: Priority has 40% weight by default in sorting algorithm
stepsToVerify: Create two tasks differing only in priority
Run 'fylla list' and verify higher priority task is first
Verify priority contributes 40% to final score

requirements.description: Due date has 30% weight by default in sorting algorithm
stepsToVerify: Create two tasks with same priority but different due dates
Run 'fylla list' and verify earlier due date is prioritized
Verify due date contributes 30% to final score

requirements.description: Estimate has 15% weight by default (smaller tasks score higher)
stepsToVerify: Create two tasks with same priority/due date but different estimates
Run 'fylla list' and verify smaller task is prioritized
Verify estimate contributes 15% to final score

requirements.description: Issue type has 10% weight by default
stepsToVerify: Create Bug and Task with otherwise identical fields
Run 'fylla list' and verify Bug is prioritized over Task
Verify issue type contributes 10% to final score

requirements.description: Age has 5% weight by default (older tasks get slight boost)
stepsToVerify: Create two tasks with same fields but different creation dates
Run 'fylla list' and verify older task gets slight priority boost
Verify age contributes 5% to final score

requirements.description: Priority scoring: Highest(1)=100, High(2)=80, Medium(3)=60, Low(4)=40, Lowest(5)=20
stepsToVerify: Calculate score for priority 1 task and verify it's 100
Calculate score for priority 5 task and verify it's 20
Verify linear interpolation between priority levels

requirements.description: Due date scoring: 0 days until due=100, 30+ days=0
stepsToVerify: Calculate score for task due today and verify it's 100
Calculate score for task due in 30+ days and verify it's 0
Verify linear decay between 0 and 30 days

requirements.description: Estimate scoring: smaller tasks score higher (quick wins)
stepsToVerify: Calculate score for 30-minute task and verify high score
Calculate score for 8-hour task and verify lower score
Verify inverse relationship between estimate and score

requirements.description: Issue type scoring: Bug=100, Task=70, Story=50
stepsToVerify: Calculate score for Bug and verify it's 100
Calculate score for Task and verify it's 70
Calculate score for Story and verify it's 50

requirements.description: Crunch mode boost: tasks due within 3 days get extra priority
stepsToVerify: Create task due in 2 days
Verify it receives crunch mode priority boost
Verify task due in 5 days does not receive boost

requirements.description: OAuth authentication flow via CLI
stepsToVerify: Run 'fylla auth google'
Verify browser opens for Google OAuth consent
Verify successful authentication message is displayed

requirements.description: OAuth credentials are cached for reuse
stepsToVerify: Complete OAuth flow once
Run 'fylla sync' without re-authenticating
Verify cached credentials are used

requirements.description: Fetch events from source calendar
stepsToVerify: Configure sourceCalendar in config
Run 'fylla sync' and verify existing events are detected
Verify events are used to determine busy times

requirements.description: Create events on fylla calendar
stepsToVerify: Run 'fylla sync' with tasks available
Open Google Calendar and verify events appear on fylla calendar
Verify events have correct start/end times

requirements.description: Delete all [Fylla] prefixed events on sync
stepsToVerify: Run 'fylla sync' to create events
Run 'fylla sync' again
Verify old events are deleted before new ones are created

requirements.description: Event titles have [Fylla] prefix with task key and summary
stepsToVerify: Run 'fylla sync' to create events
Verify event title format is '[Fylla] PROJ-123: Task summary'
Verify [LATE] prefix is added for at-risk tasks

requirements.description: Event description includes link back to Jira issue
stepsToVerify: Run 'fylla sync' to create events
Open event in Google Calendar
Verify description contains Jira issue URL

requirements.description: Detect OOO events by eventType: outOfOffice
stepsToVerify: Create OOO event using Google Calendar's OOO feature
Run 'fylla sync'
Verify no tasks are scheduled during OOO period

requirements.description: Detect OOO by title patterns (OOO, Out of Office, PTO, Vacation)
stepsToVerify: Create all-day event titled 'PTO'
Run 'fylla sync'
Verify no tasks are scheduled on that day

requirements.description: Filter slots to configured business hours
stepsToVerify: Configure business hours 09:00-17:00
Run 'fylla sync'
Verify all scheduled tasks fall within business hours

requirements.description: Skip weekends by default (configurable via workDays)
stepsToVerify: Run 'fylla sync' on a Friday
Verify no tasks are scheduled for Saturday/Sunday
Configure workDays to include weekend and verify scheduling

requirements.description: Apply buffer between tasks (default 15 min)
stepsToVerify: Run 'fylla sync' with multiple tasks
Verify 15-minute gap between consecutive tasks
Configure bufferMinutes to 30 and verify 30-minute gaps

requirements.description: Project-aware time windows filter slots per project
stepsToVerify: Configure ADMIN project with 09:00-10:00 window
Run 'fylla sync' with ADMIN task
Verify ADMIN task is only scheduled between 09:00-10:00

requirements.description: Block entire OOO time ranges from scheduling
stepsToVerify: Create multi-day OOO event (e.g., vacation)
Run 'fylla sync'
Verify entire vacation period is blocked

requirements.description: Events start from current time, not start of day
stepsToVerify: Run 'fylla sync' at 2:00 PM
Verify today's tasks are scheduled from 2:00 PM onwards
Verify no tasks are scheduled in past hours of today

requirements.description: Multi-day OOO events are handled correctly
stepsToVerify: Create week-long vacation event
Run 'fylla sync' with windowDays covering the vacation
Verify all vacation days are blocked

requirements.description: First-fit algorithm assigns highest priority task to first available slot
stepsToVerify: Create multiple tasks with different priorities
Run 'fylla sync'
Verify highest priority task gets earliest slot

requirements.description: Project filtering ensures tasks match their project's time window
stepsToVerify: Create ADMIN task and general task
Configure ADMIN project with morning-only window
Verify ADMIN task is in morning, general task uses default hours

requirements.description: Tasks without estimates default to 1 hour
stepsToVerify: Create task without estimate in Jira
Run 'fylla sync'
Verify task is scheduled for 1 hour duration

requirements.description: Minimum task duration prevents tiny fragments
stepsToVerify: Configure minTaskDurationMinutes to 25
Create situation where only 20-minute slot available
Verify task is not scheduled in that slot

requirements.description: Task splitting respects minimum duration for remainder
stepsToVerify: Create 60-minute task with 45-minute available slot
Configure minTaskDurationMinutes to 25
Verify task moves to next slot (remainder 15 min < minimum)

requirements.description: At-risk detection identifies tasks scheduled after due date
stepsToVerify: Create task due tomorrow with many higher-priority tasks
Run 'fylla sync' where task gets pushed past due date
Verify warning is shown about at-risk task

requirements.description: At-risk tasks get [LATE] prefix in calendar events
stepsToVerify: Create at-risk task (scheduled after due date)
Run 'fylla sync'
Verify calendar event title starts with '[LATE]'

requirements.description: Start timer stores task key and start time
stepsToVerify: Run 'fylla start PROJ-123'
Verify confirmation message is displayed
Verify task key and start time are stored

requirements.description: Timer state persisted to ~/.config/fylla/timer.json
stepsToVerify: Run 'fylla start PROJ-123'
Check ~/.config/fylla/timer.json exists
Verify file contains task key and start timestamp

requirements.description: Stop timer calculates elapsed time correctly
stepsToVerify: Run 'fylla start PROJ-123', wait 5 minutes
Run 'fylla stop'
Verify elapsed time is approximately 5 minutes

requirements.description: Stop command prompts for description if not provided
stepsToVerify: Run 'fylla stop' without --description flag
Verify interactive prompt asks for description
Verify description is included in worklog

requirements.description: Time is rounded to nearest 5 minutes (configurable)
stepsToVerify: Run timer for 7 minutes
Stop timer and verify logged time is 5 or 10 minutes
Verify rounding follows configured interval

requirements.description: Status command shows currently running task and elapsed time
stepsToVerify: Run 'fylla start PROJ-123'
Run 'fylla status'
Verify output shows task key, summary, and elapsed time

requirements.description: Delete all existing [Fylla] events from Google Calendar
stepsToVerify: Run 'fylla sync' to create events
Run 'fylla sync' again
Verify old [Fylla] events are deleted before new ones created

requirements.description: Fetch Jira tasks using configured JQL
stepsToVerify: Configure defaultJql in config
Run 'fylla sync'
Verify tasks matching JQL are fetched

requirements.description: Sort tasks by composite score before allocation
stepsToVerify: Create tasks with varying priorities, due dates, estimates
Run 'fylla sync --dry-run'
Verify tasks are scheduled in score order

requirements.description: Fetch Google Calendar events within scheduling window
stepsToVerify: Create meetings in Google Calendar
Run 'fylla sync'
Verify meetings are detected as busy times

requirements.description: Find free slots per project respecting time windows
stepsToVerify: Configure project-specific time rules
Run 'fylla sync' with tasks from different projects
Verify each task gets slots matching its project's rules

requirements.description: Allocate tasks to slots using first-fit algorithm
stepsToVerify: Run 'fylla sync --dry-run'
Verify highest priority tasks get earliest slots
Verify allocation respects minimum duration rules

requirements.description: Create fresh [Fylla] calendar events
stepsToVerify: Run 'fylla sync'
Open Google Calendar
Verify [Fylla] events are created with correct details

requirements.description: Show warnings for at-risk tasks after sync
stepsToVerify: Create task that will be scheduled after its due date
Run 'fylla sync'
Verify warning message shows task key and scheduling conflict

requirements.description: CLI entry point at cmd/fylla/main.go
stepsToVerify: Run 'go run ./cmd/fylla'
Verify CLI starts without errors
Verify help is displayed when no command given

requirements.description: auth jira command accepts --url, --email, --token
stepsToVerify: Run 'fylla auth jira --url URL --email EMAIL --token TOKEN'
Verify credentials are stored
Verify subsequent Jira commands work

requirements.description: auth google command initiates OAuth flow
stepsToVerify: Run 'fylla auth google'
Verify OAuth flow starts
Verify credentials are cached after successful auth

requirements.description: sync command creates calendar events from Jira tasks
stepsToVerify: Run 'fylla sync' with valid credentials
Verify [Fylla] events appear in Google Calendar
Verify events match scheduled tasks

requirements.description: sync --dry-run previews schedule without creating events
stepsToVerify: Run 'fylla sync --dry-run'
Verify schedule is displayed in console
Verify no events are created in Google Calendar

requirements.description: sync --jql allows custom JQL query override
stepsToVerify: Run 'fylla sync --jql "project = MYPROJ"'
Verify only MYPROJ tasks are scheduled
Verify default JQL is not used

requirements.description: sync --days overrides scheduling window
stepsToVerify: Run 'fylla sync --days 10'
Verify events are created up to 10 days ahead
Verify default windowDays is overridden

requirements.description: sync --from and --to allow explicit date range
stepsToVerify: Run 'fylla sync --from 2025-01-20 --to 2025-01-24'
Verify events are only created within specified range
Verify dates outside range are ignored

requirements.description: list command shows sorted tasks without scheduling
stepsToVerify: Run 'fylla list'
Verify tasks are displayed in priority order
Verify no calendar events are created

requirements.description: start TASK-KEY begins timer for specified task
stepsToVerify: Run 'fylla start PROJ-123'
Verify 'Started timer for PROJ-123' message
Verify timer state is persisted

requirements.description: stop command ends timer and logs to Jira
stepsToVerify: Start timer, then run 'fylla stop'
Verify prompt for description appears
Verify worklog is created in Jira

requirements.description: stop --description provides inline description
stepsToVerify: Run 'fylla stop --description "Fixed the bug"'
Verify no interactive prompt appears
Verify worklog uses provided description

requirements.description: status command shows running task and elapsed time
stepsToVerify: Start timer, then run 'fylla status'
Verify task key and summary are displayed
Verify elapsed time is shown and updates

requirements.description: log TASK-KEY DURATION DESCRIPTION creates manual worklog
stepsToVerify: Run 'fylla log PROJ-123 2h "Worked on feature"'
Verify worklog is created in Jira
Verify time and description are correct

requirements.description: estimate TASK-KEY DURATION sets remaining estimate
stepsToVerify: Run 'fylla estimate PROJ-123 4h'
Verify Jira remaining estimate is 4h
Verify confirmation message is displayed

requirements.description: estimate supports +/- for relative adjustments
stepsToVerify: Set estimate to 4h, then run 'fylla estimate PROJ-123 +2h'
Verify remaining estimate is now 6h
Run 'fylla estimate PROJ-123 -1h' and verify 5h

requirements.description: add command provides interactive task creation
stepsToVerify: Run 'fylla add'
Verify prompts for project, type, summary, description, estimate, priority
Verify task is created in Jira

requirements.description: add --quick mode prompts only for essential fields
stepsToVerify: Run 'fylla add --quick'
Verify only project, summary, and estimate are prompted
Verify task is created with default type and priority

requirements.description: add --project pre-selects project
stepsToVerify: Run 'fylla add --project PROJ'
Verify project prompt is skipped
Verify task is created in PROJ project

requirements.description: config show displays current configuration
stepsToVerify: Run 'fylla config show'
Verify all config sections are displayed
Verify sensitive values are masked

requirements.description: config edit opens config in $EDITOR
stepsToVerify: Set $EDITOR to vim, run 'fylla config edit'
Verify config file opens in vim
Verify changes are saved when editor exits

requirements.description: config set KEY VALUE modifies specific config values
stepsToVerify: Run 'fylla config set scheduling.windowDays 7'
Run 'fylla config show' and verify windowDays is 7
Verify nested keys work (e.g., projectRules.ADMIN.end)
